name: skills-marketplace
description: Personal marketplace of fine-tuned skills for paper writing, LaTeX, and verified math proofs.

plugins.name: writing
plugins.description: Paper-writing skill that tracks a draft's modification history across sessions via a per-draft journal file backed by git, and infers the draft's forward trajectory (not just past diffs). The flagship skill in this marketplace.

plugins.name: latex
plugins.description: Narrow-scoped LaTeX skill: venue templates, compile-error log triage (points at the actual offending file/line), and bib hygiene (duplicate keys, missing fields).

plugins.name: math
plugins.description: Proof structure enforcement (claim/assumptions/proof/where-used) plus a real SymPy verification round-trip for symbolic and numeric sub-claims, with Lean-formalization candidates flagged (not forced).
